hops.context: ReCA consistently outperforms ReLU in both top-1 and top-5 accuracy.
ReLU evaluated on CIFAR-100 showing top-1 accuracy of 47.17, 48.05, 51.99 in different runs.
ResNet-56 model evaluated on CIFAR-100 dataset.

question: Which of the following statements best describes the performance comparison of ReCA and ReLU when evaluated using the ResNet-56 model on the CIFAR-100 dataset?

options.A: Both ReCA and ReLU have identical top-1 accuracies of 47.17, 48.05, 51.99 when tested on CIFAR-100 using the ResNet-56 model.
options.B: ReLU demonstrates superior performance compared to ReCA in both top-1 and top-5 accuracy on CIFAR-100 with the ResNet-56 model.
options.C: ReCA and ReLU show no significant difference in performance on CIFAR-100 when evaluated with the ResNet-56 model.
options.D: ReCA consistently exhibits higher top-1 and top-5 accuracy than ReLU on CIFAR-100 when using the ResNet-56 model.

explanation: The correct answer is A because the context states that ReCA consistently outperforms ReLU in both top-1 and top-5 accuracy, specifically when evaluated on the CIFAR-100 dataset using a model like ResNet-56. Options B, C, and D are incorrect as they either misrepresent the performance comparison or inaccurately describe the results.
context: ReCA consistently outperforms ReLU in both top-1 and top-5 accuracy. | ReLU evaluated on CIFAR-100 showing top-1 accuracy of 47.17, 48.05, 51.99 in different runs. | ResNet-56 model evaluated on CIFAR-100 dataset.
